findings.description: The footnote reference 'Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' is a hyperlink in the PDF but is rendered as plain underlined text without an <a href> in the HTML, losing the link destination.
findings.evidence: PDF page 4 footnote: 'Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' appears as a clickable hyperlink. HTML renders it as: '<sup>1</sup> <u>Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)</u>' with no <a href> wrapping.
